Package index

All functions

check_installable()
Check Multiple Packages for Installability
check_packages()
Check Package Dependencies
clean_description()
Clean Unused Packages from DESCRIPTION
clean_package_names()
Clean and Validate Package Names
create_renv_lock()
Create Empty renv.lock
extract_code_packages()
Extract Package References from R Code
fix_packages()
Fix Packages (Convenience Wrapper)
is_installable()
Check if Package is Installable
parse_description_all_deps()
Parse DESCRIPTION All Dependencies
parse_description_imports()
Parse DESCRIPTION Imports
parse_renv_lock()
Parse renv.lock Packages
remove_from_renv_lock()
Remove Packages from renv.lock
report_packages()
Report Package Status
sync_packages()
Sync Packages to Code

Developed by Ronald (Ryy) G Thomas.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
